creator: lordsith49@hotmail.com
text:
Current port release: 2.04
Current product release as of 10/8/2012: 2.05

My testing involved a simple bump of the PORTVERSION in the Makefile and updating distinfo accordingly. Torrus 2.05 was successfully built and is successfully running on two FreeBSD 9.1-RC2 amd64 servers with the 'fix' I've listed.
